_comment: Verification harness for PR #407 (test-only e2e flakiness stabilization). No production bug; these are contract-style PROOFS of the two design claims the review conclusion rests on. Consumed by scripts/re-verify.sh.

findings.note: coordinated_policy.go MaxSkew 50%->33%: real CoordinationScaler steps 1->2->3 at 33% but jumps 1->3 at 50%; OrderReady gates the next batch. Backs the skew<=1 e2e assertion being deterministic.

scaling_adapter.go updateRbgSpecV2Retry is retry-safe: re-Get via real controller-runtime client resets Spec.Roles so the append is re-applied idempotently on a 409 retry (no double-append). Includes a harness-bites control proving the broken pattern doubles.

liveNote: No live layer: PR is test-only and no KUBECONFIG was provided. Full e2e already runs green in CI (e2e-test, 28m). Compile of the changed e2e package proven at PR head — see results/e2e-compile.txt.
manualChecks: e2e package compiles at PR head: `go vet ./test/e2e/testcase/v1alpha2/` (captured in results/e2e-compile.txt).
